runs.text: We wanted to let you know that your return has been processed successfully. If you chose a refund to your credit or debit card, you should see the refund on your bank statement in the next 5-7 business days. If you returned your item for store credit, you should see that credit in your Huckberry account immediately.
Questions or concerns? Drop us a line at
